nasb.text: I will pour out My indignation on you; I will blow on you with the fire of My wrath, and I will give you into the hand of brutal men, skilled in destruction.

esv.text: And I will pour out my indignation upon you; I will blow upon you with the fire of my wrath, and I will deliver you into the hands of brutish men, skillful to destroy.

cnv.text: 我必把我的忿怒倒在你身上，把我的怒火噴在你身上，又把你交在那些慣於毀滅的野蠻人手中。

ccb.text: 我要把烈怒倒在你们身上，将我的怒火喷在你们身上，把你们交在嗜杀成性的恶徒手中，
